name: Hand-Eye Calibration Data Generation
description: A robotics perception engineer is developing a self-calibration routine for an eye-in-hand camera system and needs a ground-truth simulated dataset from CoppeliaSim (ZMQ Remote API port 23000). Generate a dataset by programmatically attaching a vision sensor to the robot's end-effector with a non-zero local translation offset and recording synchronized world-frame poses (position and quaternion [x,y,z,w]) for both the end-effector and the camera across at least 20 diverse joint configurations. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/hand_eye_dataset.csv with columns: sample_id, ee_x, ee_y, ee_z, ee_qx, ee_qy, ee_qz, ee_qw, cam_x, cam_y, cam_z, cam_qx, cam_qy, cam_qz, cam_qw. Additionally, save dataset_report.json to the same directory with fields: total_samples, ee_handle, camera_handle, local_offset_x, local_offset_y, local_offset_z. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
